description.value:
Receive Medication data MTD building blocks for patient J. XXX_Laan
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_kwalificatie_medicatiegegevens_ontvangen_MTD
Original description: KWAL Medicatiegegevens MTD script 8
Receive Medication data MTD resources in a transaction Bundle
Test server to handle a Bundle of type transaction.
Checks if all resources specified by the scenario can be identified unambiguously.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationAdministration).where(category.coding.code = '18629005').where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '1184601') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '53821') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '108278') ))).count() = 2

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationAdministration).where(category.coding.code = '18629005').where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '1184601') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '53821') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '108278') ))).count() = 2

description.value: Confirm that the response Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '1184601|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.7' (FRAXIPARINE FORTE INJV 11400IE/0,6ML(19000IE/ML)WW)
